x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: IRE identification rules prevent duplicate CIs from being created by discovery. Well-configured IRE means the CMDB stays clean as discovery runs, preserving the single-source-of-truth that Now Assist AI depends on.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure IRE identification rules for all key CI classes via cmdb_identifier_list.do. Ensure each class has strong identifier entries (serial number, MAC address, hostname). Target: 10+ active IRE rules. Well-configured IRE is the primary defense against duplicate CI creation.
